---
name: Pattern Request
about: Request a new module pattern
title: "[PATTERN] "
labels: pattern, good first issue
---

## Module
Which Python module should this pattern cover? (e.g. `boto3`, `redis`, `celery`)

## Pattern Description
What should mustel detect? (e.g. "S3 bucket created without encryption", "Redis connection without password")

## Why is this a risk?
Explain the security or bug risk.

## Example Bad Code
```python
# Code that should trigger this pattern
```

## Example Good Code
```python
# Code that should NOT trigger this pattern
```

## CWE (optional)
If you know the relevant CWE ID (e.g. CWE-89 for SQL injection), include it.
